voice_observations.caption_text:
For 𝟐𝟎 𝐘𝐄𝐀𝐑𝐒, Fitness First has been moving bodies, building confidence, and shaping stronger communities - in and out of the gym.

To celebrate this milestone, we’re giving you 20% OFF across some of our favourite experiences:
✨ Memberships
🏊‍♂️ Swim lessons
🏋️ Personal training

Plus, one open invitation to be part of something bigger:
Experience our clubs, train alongside friends and family, and take part in exclusive classes, workouts.

🗓 26 January – 2 February
⏳ Limited time only. Terms & conditions apply.

𝟐𝟎 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐦𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭. 𝐀 𝐥𝐢𝐟𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐭.
Now let’s keep moving - together. 🚀🔥

CLICK THE LINK IN BIO FOR ALL THE DETAILS 👉🔗
#𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘𝐀𝐓𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐒𝐓 ❤️ 

#FitnessFirstMe #AboveAndBeyond #GoFurtherWithFitnessFirst #FF20yearsStronger
